guarantors.name: Rose Courtney
guarantors.story: Primary guarantor - covers B-001, B-002, B-003. Combined exposure AUD 4.2M. Connected via BUT050 to G-002 (same family trust).

guarantors.name: Eric Miller
guarantors.story: Secondary guarantor - covers B-004, B-005. Connected to G-001. Combined group exposure AUD 7.8M - breaches APS 221.

bp2_contacts.name: Rose Courtney
bp2_contacts.story_role: G-001 - guarantor for B-001, B-002, B-003

connected_parties.risk_note: Both guarantors are contacts of same corporate entity. Synthetic BUT050 relationship added to make G-001/G-002 explicitly related (family trust structure).

risk_patterns.name: Guarantor Concentration - G-001
risk_patterns.description: Guarantor Rose Courtney (G-001) covers 3 borrowers (B-001, B-002, B-003), all with overdue repayments

risk_patterns.name: Connected Party Group Exposure - G-001/G-002
risk_patterns.description: G-001 (Rose Courtney) connected to G-002 (Eric Miller) via family trust. Combined group exposure breaches APS 221 large exposure limit.

risk_patterns.name: Sector Concentration - Retail Property
risk_patterns.description: B-001, B-002, B-007, B-011 all in RETAIL_PROP sector. Combined exposure approaching concentration limit.

risk_patterns.name: DTI Breach - B-003
risk_patterns.description: Borrower B-003 (Domestic Customer AU 3) has DTI ratio 7.2, above APRA February 2026 limit of 6.0. Loan approved pre-limit.
